title: Multifamily Dwellings: Multifamily properties can only be...
summary: Evaluate whether multifamily properties include low-rise, mid-rise, and high-rise categories.
prompt: Multifamily properties can only be classified as high-rise buildings.
solution: Multifamily properties can be classified into three categories: low-rise (fewer than four floors), mid-rise (four to ten floors), and high-rise (over ten floors). This classification helps investors assess the type of investment and its corresponding market demand.
